summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3-part behavioral notification system. Backend tests fully passed (100% success rate) including reminder engine startup, notification endpoints, and favorites with utc_date field. Frontend tests confirmed GuessIt countdown timers, urgency styling, filter switching, and local timezone display are working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: CSS animation keyframes not detected via automated testing, though urgency classes are properly applied
minor_issues.note: Urgency styling (colors, classes) is working correctly, animation detection may be timing-related

passed_tests: Backend health check (/api/health) works after reminder engine added
Backend starts without errors and reminder engine logs show 'Reminder engine started'
Reminder engine running in background ('Reminder engine task scheduled' found in logs)
Favorite matches endpoint POST /api/favorites/matches accepts utc_date field
Homepage loads correctly with 53 match cards displayed
GuessIt countdown timers show correct time (00:33:56 format) and urgency styling
CSS urgency classes (guess-btn-urgency) are defined and properly applied to buttons
GuessIt buttons have red border color transition when in urgency phase (<1 hour)
Filter switching works correctly between All/Live/competition filters
Match times display in local timezone format (not UTC)
Frontend loads match cards with proper countdown timers (6 active timers found)
Admin login authentication works with session cookies
